query:
-- Sample the services that would be matched via octane_customer_links
SELECT s.externalId, s.phoneNumber, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.customerExternalId as currentCustomer,
       ocl.internalCustomerExternalId as newCustomer, ocl.internalCustomerName as newCustomerName,
       ocl.octaneServiceName
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL')
ORDER BY s.externalId
LIMIT 10;

-- Sample the services that would be matched via octane_customer_links
SELECT s.externalId, s.phoneNumber, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.customerExternalId as currentCustomer,
       ocl.internalCustomerExternalId as newCustomer, ocl.internalCustomerName as newCustomerName,
       ocl.octaneServiceName
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL')
ORDER BY s.externalId
LIMIT 10;
